NON-OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO MEDIATE IN LIEU OF ARBITRATION FILED BY DEFENDANT YU, VIVIAN YU, MICHAEL

PLAINTIFF MARIA CHERUNDOLOS'S MOTION TO MEDIATE IN LIEU OF ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN 5 DAYS. THE CASE IS ORDERED REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION AND SCHEDULED FOR A MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR 11/12/2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 212. THE COURT ALSO ORDERED THE CASE SCHEDULED FOR A JURY TRIAL ON 1/26/2009 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 206. THE COURT SHALL GIVE NOTICE OF THE TRIAL DATE AND THE MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ, CSR# 7782. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Mediate In Lieu Of Arbitation;
Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court adopts its tentative ruling: Plaintiff Maria Cherundolos's Motion to Mediate in Lieu of Arbitration is GRANTED. The moving party is to submit a proposed order within 5 days. The case is ordered removed from arbitration and scheduled for a Mediation Order to Show Cause Hearing set for 11/12/2008 at 10:00 AM in Department 212. The court also ordered the case scheduled for a Jury Trial on 1/26/2009 at 9:30 AM in Department 206. The court shall give notice of the Trial Date and the Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. (212)
